artPrompt: A cracked asphalt parking lot at the edge of midnight, faded blank paint stripes and a leaning sign-post with a smudged illegible placard, guttering candles set out among empty spaces, the vast clock tower looming over the lot in blood-dark hazy sky, bone-white and cold-gold light pooling on the tarmac, desolate and tender, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Repent-or-Park-Here Lot
text:
Repent-or-Park-Here Lot enters the battlefield tapped unless you control a Cleric, Prophet, or Doomsayer.
{T}: Add {W} or {B}.
{T}, Pay 2 life: Add {W}{B}. Validate your parking; validate your soul; one of these is optional.
